ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the species belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the species belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum to which the species belongs */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom to which the species belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  "reference_genome_url" TEXT /* URL to the reference genome data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the clustering method (e.g., HCCA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clustering method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used in the clustering method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters and settings used for the clustering method */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics for evaluating the performance of the clustering method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the clustering method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_family_methods" (
  "family_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene family method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene family method (e.g., Archaeplastida) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene family method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used in the gene family method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters and settings used for the gene family method */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics for evaluating the performance of the gene family method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the gene family method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster (e.g., Cluster_8) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clustering method used */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the cluster belongs to */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard index to measure the similarity between clusters */,
  "family_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene family method used for comparison */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions that can be taken on the cluster (e.g., Compare) */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the cluster */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cluster (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the cluster */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cluster */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES clustering_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_family_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_method_id") REFERENCES gene_family_methods ("family_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cluster */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was accessed */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken on the cluster (e.g., view, compare) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster detail */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the detail belongs to */,
  "gene_composition" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of genes in the cluster */,
  "additional_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the cluster */,
  "gene_count" INTEGER /* Number of genes in the cluster */,
  "gene_list" TEXT /* List of genes in the cluster */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation of the genes in the cluster */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* Biological processes associated with the genes in the cluster */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* Molecular functions associated with the genes in the cluster */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* Cellular components associated with the genes in the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_details_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_clusters" (
  "project_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-cluster relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_clusters_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_clusters_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
